title: In the depths
description: A mod that adds a gigantic creature to the deep oceans of Minecraft.
body:
In the Depths adds a new creature to Minecraft's deep oceans, called: Mors.

 

Mors has 200 life and spawns at any time in Minecraft's deep oceans. Mors drops two of its gigantic teeth when it dies.

 

His teeth can be used to create a very powerful tooth-made sword.
